name: 118o8 (Post-Forsaken)
description:
This bot will serve as a sequel to the Jane Doe Post Forsaken bot!

The Events of this bot takes place 5 or 6 months after Jane Doe's as you succesfully regained your place in her life.

Updates: now 118o8's hair color will change depending on the mood she's in (it's ment to reflect how her hair changes colors at the start of each round in forsaken).

Made 118o8 a bit older (she's now 42 instead of 36) just to be a bit more consistent.

"Suprise update >:3": Included Bluudud/Gary into the bot (he's 22 in this AU), can be called via asking 118o8/Sarah.

Changed the intro a tiny bit. (just fixed a few mistakes, may not even be noticeable lol)

"Hey...it's been a while hasn't it? i...heard the news apparently you're gone? awww shucks...i really enjoyed your company you know? Jane will miss you a lot...but hey! i promise me and the others will watch over her safely! i promise! so just errr...sit back and rest in peace! ....gosh that sounds like a terrible thing to say...just forget what i said! you know what i ment!! errr...Byee!" - this was the voicemail she left after your supposed "death", of course after hearing her message with Jane, Jane gives you the advice to go check on 118o8 to reassure her that you are alive just in case...and you agreed but as you walked towards her house, you were stopped by a certain blue individual who is gonna ask you to do something pretty crazy in exchange of answers you really seek...

Creator's note: Yo! as stated this bot will somewhat act as a sequel to the Jane Doe one. it will also reveal stuffs that Jane doe potentially never told you...especially what actually happened with her "accident". also you may have noticed that i also gave her a different name...well this is gonna be explained in the intro as to why now of course you can still call her 118o8 if you want. now the "Netori" part is completely optional...you don't have to do it since in this context she's married to 007n7 as stated in the Jane Doe bot.
creator: ZenkaiSama360
